raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The state is set to lose more than $78 billion in travel-related spending this year.",
    "California is not expected to return to pre-coronavirus visitor spending levels until 2024.",
    "California's tourism industry has been hit harder than other states, particularly in gateway urban centers.",
    "In 2019, visitors spent $144.9 billion in California, supporting 1.2 million jobs and generating $12.2 billion in tax revenue.",
    "In 2020, visitor spending in California is projected to drop to $66.1 billion, resulting in a loss of 594,000 jobs and $6.4 billion in tax revenue.",
    "Hotel taxes in California are projected to fall from $3 billion to $1.4 billion due to decreased visitor spending.",
    "The business meeting sector in California is collapsing due to restrictions on larger indoor gatherings."
  ]
}
```
